name: AIBOM: compliance/aibom.sh emits compliance/AIBOM-<tag>.json with bomFormat:CycloneDX and specVersion:1.6
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && grep -E "\"bomFormat\":\"CycloneDX\"" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && grep -E "\"specVersion\":\"1.6\"" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
